name: Kimi k1.5
archDisplay: Transformer, RL-trained long/short-CoT reasoning (parameter count undisclosed)
note: Moonshot's first RL-trained multimodal reasoning model, claiming OpenAI o1-level math, coding, and vision performance.
verificationNotes: Confirmed genuine via arXiv:2501.12599 ('Kimi k1.5: Scaling Reinforcement Learning with LLMs', submitted 2025-01-20, matches releaseDate) and MoonshotAI/Kimi-k1.5 GitHub repo. All four benchmark rows (AIME 77.5, MATH-500 96.2, LiveCodeBench 47.3, MathVista 74.9) independently re-fetched from the exact sourceUrl and confirmed to literally match. apiAvailable:false confirmed correct — k1.5 was a research release; Moonshot's current public API model list (platform.kimi.ai) does not list a kimi-k1.5 model ID. No changes needed.
